results.rendered_html:
subhara adj. (f. ā)
1〉 massig, dicht; gedrungen, reichlich: (barhiḥ) stīrṇaṃ rāye subharam  ṚV. 2,3,4 . chardis 10,35,12 . bhandanāḥ 9,86,41 . asaścataḥ 1,112,2 . 20 . vīra 2,3,9 .
— 2〉 leicht zu tragen, — zu handhaben  ŚAT. BR. 1,4,5,1 .
